title: Sandbox — your first letter
title_zh: 沙盒 — 你的第一封信
blurb: A public NYC yellow-taxi sample where anyone and their agent walk one complete round — ask, code, safety-scan, run, result, merge — in about thirty minutes. A CI robot plays the Runner, so no one has to be online for you to start.
blurb_zh: 在公开的纽约出租车样本上，任何人和他的 agent 都能在约三十分钟内走完整整一轮——提问、写码、安全扫描、运行、出结果、合并。CI 机器人担任执行方，无需任何人在线你就能开始。
